title: Void Shrine (Cursed Fate Addon)
description: This mod adds a custom technique to the Jujutsu Kaisen: Cursed Fate Mod
body:
Void Shrine is a completely unique evolution of Base Shrine from Jujutsu Kaisen Cursed Fate.

you can get it by crafting a Totem of Malice and Dejection (crafting recipe is automatically given) and pop it, but you need to have base shrine in order for that to work.

This technique is actually stronger then Calamitous Shrine in strength and attack potency, its got a large array of attacks that all have custom effects and animations and unique features (its also all purple). here's its move set:

NOTE: there is a gamerule to turn off destruction.

# Ability 1: Void Swordplay

The user creates a slash that will instantly appear at a nearby entity (provided it can reach them)

# Ability 2: Void Dismantle

The user sends out a slash, that when it hits generates a cavitation bubble explosion

Chant: Maximum output: Void Dismantle

# Ability 3: Disturbing Presence

The user opens a simple domain imbued with cleaves, both acting as a offense and a defense

Flow: Instead does Void Cleave Rush

# Ability 4: Void Cleave

The user makes small short range slashes infront of themselves dealing high damage

Flow: Makes the slashes bigger and deal more damage

# Ability 5: Truely Devilish, Open Abyss (Abyssal Fuga)

The user charges up a attack before letting go and releasing a trident of cursed energy and it explodes making a abyssal hole into the void and stunning if not killing all nearby

Flow: Makes radius bigger

# Ability 6: Domain Expansion: Malicious Void Shrine

If you move in this Domain, you will be cleaved to bits.



this is my first mod and addon so im by far not perfect but i hope you all enjoy this just as much as i do, and thank you to all that helped me through making this. i will be making a video on this and another technique im making here soon.

stay larping!
